display.purpose: Hero headline only. Set tight, weight 600, sized to fill the viewport.

headline.purpose: Section openings. The second-tier voice on a page.

title.purpose: Subheaders and card titles. Ranks above body, below section openings.

body.purpose: Reading copy. Capped at 65 to 75ch line length.

label.purpose: Buttons, navigation, captions, the legal disclaimer.

mono.purpose: Inline code, addresses, transaction ids. Geist Mono.

pixel.purpose: Protocol artefacts only: amounts, mint ids, version strings. Geist Pixel Square.

shadows.name: btn-rim
shadows.purpose: The darker bezel rim under a primary chip. True-black ring directly outside the Ink Soft fill so the chip edge reads.

shadows.name: btn-rim-secondary
shadows.purpose: Hair-coloured rim for the secondary (Paper-fill) chip on Paper sections — defines the edge without ink.

shadows.name: btn-rim-on-ink
shadows.purpose: Slate rim for the on-ink chip variant sitting on a black section. Darker than Hair so the rim reads against Ink.

shadows.name: btn-elev-1
shadows.purpose: Tight inner drop shadow on a chip. Y offset 1, blur 2.

shadows.name: btn-elev-2
shadows.purpose: Wider drop shadow on a chip. Y offset 2, blur 4. Pairs with btn-elev-1 for the resting-state lift.

shadows.name: btn-inner-highlight
shadows.purpose: The white top-edge highlight inside the primary Ink Soft chip. Reads as ambient light on a glossy ink surface.

motion.name: ease-quart-out
motion.purpose: Default easing for state transitions (hover, focus). Exponential ease-out.

components.name: Primary Button (Lifted Ink Slab)
components.description: The principal CTA. Ink Soft slab on Paper with sharp corners (border-radius 0 — doctrinal), a true-black rim, layered drop shadows, and a white inner top highlight. The only surface in the system permitted to carry box-shadow. Hover lifts by translateY(-1px); active settles by translateY(1px).
components.css: .btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; background: #18181b; color: #ffffff; padding: 14px 28px; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.22); border-radius: 0; font-family: 'GT-Standard', ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.2; letter-spacing: -0.005em; cursor: pointer; box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px #000000, 0 1px 2px rgba(9,9,11,0.08), 0 2px 4px rgba(9,9,11,0.16), inset 0 1px 20px rgba(255,255,255,0.16); transition: transform 150ms cubic-bezier(0.25,1,0.5,1), box-shadow 150ms cubic-bezier(0.25,1,0.5,1), background-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.25,1,0.5,1); } .btn-primary:hover { background: #27272a; transform: translateY(-1px); box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px #000000, 0 2px 4px rgba(9,9,11,0.10), 0 4px 8px rgba(9,9,11,0.20), inset 0 1px 20px rgba(255,255,255,0.18); } .btn-primary:active { transform: translateY(1px); box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px #000000, 0 1px 1px rgba(9,9,11,0.06), 0 1px 2px rgba(9,9,11,0.10), inset 0 1px 20px rgba(255,255,255,0.12); } .btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #000000; outline-offset: 4px; } @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) { .btn-primary { transition: box-shadow 150ms linear, background-color 150ms linear; } .btn-primary:hover, .btn-primary:active { transform: none; } }

components.name: Secondary Button (Paper Slab)
components.description: Quieter slab. Sharp corners (border-radius 0). Paper fill on Paper sections with a Hair rim and the same lift mechanics as the primary at reduced intensity. No inner highlight (invisible on white). Used for the hero's GitHub / Blog row, tab selectors, and other tertiary actions.
components.css: .btn-secondary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; background: #ffffff; color: #18181b; padding: 10px 22px; border: 1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.04); border-radius: 0; font-family: 'GT-Standard', ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.2; letter-spacing: -0.005em; cursor: pointer; box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px #e4e4e7, 0 1px 2px rgba(9,9,11,0.04), 0 2px 4px rgba(9,9,11,0.08); transition: transform 150ms cubic-bezier(0.25,1,0.5,1), box-shadow 150ms cubic-bezier(0.25,1,0.5,1), background-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.25,1,0.5,1); } .btn-secondary:hover { background: #fafafa; transform: translateY(-1px); box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px #a1a1aa, 0 2px 4px rgba(9,9,11,0.06), 0 4px 8px rgba(9,9,11,0.10); } .btn-secondary:active { transform: translateY(1px); box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px #d4d4d8, 0 1px 1px rgba(9,9,11,0.04), 0 1px 2px rgba(9,9,11,0.06); } .btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #000000; outline-offset: 4px; } @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) { .btn-secondary { transition: box-shadow 150ms linear, background-color 150ms linear; } .btn-secondary:hover, .btn-secondary:active { transform: none; } }

components.name: Primary Button — On Ink (Paper Slab on Black)
components.description: The closing-CTA variant. Sharp corners. Paper slab on an Ink section with a Slate rim and deeper drop shadows so the slab reads against black, plus a stronger inner top highlight. Pairs with .btn-primary--lg for the large closing scale.
components.css: .btn-primary--on-ink { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; background: #ffffff; color: #18181b; padding: 14px 28px; border: 1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.06); border-radius: 0; font-family: 'GT-Standard', ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.2; letter-spacing: -0.005em; cursor: pointer; box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px #3f3f46, 0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.20), 0 2px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.32), inset 0 1px 20px rgba(255,255,255,0.50); transition: transform 150ms cubic-bezier(0.25,1,0.5,1), box-shadow 150ms cubic-bezier(0.25,1,0.5,1); } .btn-primary--on-ink:hover { transform: translateY(-1px); box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px #52525b, 0 2px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.24), 0 4px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.36), inset 0 1px 20px rgba(255,255,255,0.60); } .btn-primary--on-ink:active { transform: translateY(1px); box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px #3f3f46, 0 1px 1px rgba(0,0,0,0.16), 0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.24), inset 0 1px 20px rgba(255,255,255,0.40); } .btn-primary--on-ink:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #ffffff; outline-offset: 4px; } .btn-primary--lg { padding: 16px 32px; font-size: 0.9375rem; }

components.name: Nav Link
components.description: Top-bar navigation links. Slate at rest, Ink on hover. No underline, no active background.
components.css: .ds-nav-link { color: #3f3f46; font-family: 'GT-Standard', ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.4; text-decoration: none; transition: color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1); } .ds-nav-link:hover { color: #000000; } .ds-nav-link:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #000000; outline-offset: 4px; border-radius: 2px; }

components.name: Hero Display Headline
components.description: The signature hero treatment. GT-Standard at clamp(3.75rem, 9vw, 9rem), weight 600, line-height 0.95, letter-spacing −0.02em. Wraps deliberately.
components.css: .ds-hero-display { color: #000000; font-family: 'GT-Standard', ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: clamp(3.75rem, 9vw, 9rem); font-weight: 600; line-height: 0.95; letter-spacing: -0.02em; margin: 0; }

components.name: Pixel Notation
components.description: Inline protocol artefact set in Geist Pixel Square. Use for amounts, mint ids, version strings inside human prose.
components.html: Your balance is 21,000 sats across two mints.
components.css: .ds-body { color: #000000; font-family: 'GT-Standard', ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 400; line-height: 1.5; margin: 0; max-width: 65ch; } .ds-pixel { font-family: 'GeistPixelSquare', 'Geist Mono', monospace; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1; letter-spacing: 0.04em; }

components.name: Hairline Divider
components.description: The system's only structural separator. A single 1px line in Hair, full content width.

components.name: Placeholder Surface
components.description: Temporary surface awaiting a real asset (hero image, mint screenshot). Chalk background, Fog caption, 16px radius. Replace before shipping; never final.
components.html: hero image placeholder
components.css: .ds-placeholder { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; aspect-ratio: 16 / 9; width: 100%; background: #f4f4f5; color: #a1a1aa; border-radius: 16px; font-family: 'GT-Standard', ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; }

narrative.overview:
cashu.space dresses an open protocol in the visual register of a published RFC. Tight grid, fixed-width-quoted accents, monumental display type, and almost nothing decorative. The site reads as primary-source material — not a marketing page for a coin, not a fintech dashboard, not a Web3 launchpad.

The system commits to a few sharp moves: massive editorial display type (GT-Standard) carries the page; neutrals stay pure (ink-on-paper, no tint, no warmth); structural elements are minimal — a thin horizontal rule, a pair of sharp-cornered lifted-ink slabs (the only surfaces in the system that carry shadow), generous whitespace. The Geist Pixel accent exists for one purpose: to mark machine-coded artefacts when the spec calls for a notation different from prose.

Color is intentionally absent. The palette is paper, ink, and a graded family of greys. This is a doctrine, not a placeholder. The bitcoin-curious audience reads sovereignty in restraint; any added accent would dilute the signal.
keyCharacteristics: Monochrome by doctrine: paper, ink, six grades of grey, no chromatic accent.
Display type does the heaviest lifting: GT-Standard at 6rem–9rem on the hero, set tight (line-height 0.95, letter-spacing −0.02em).
Generous editorial whitespace; sections breathe at 80–128px vertical rhythm on large screens.

One lifted surface (the sharp-cornered button slab with rim + drop shadow + inner highlight) on an otherwise flat page — every other container is flat, separated by a hairline divider and generous whitespace. Sharp corners site-wide, including on the lifted button. Only the CTA is allowed to look pressable.
Cashu's protocol artefacts (amounts, ids, addresses) are set in Geist Pixel Square as a deliberate notation contrast.

rules.name: The No-Colour Rule
rules.body: The system uses no chromatic accent. Greys may shift by lightness but never by hue. If a future surface 'needs' colour, the design is wrong — work the hierarchy with type and space before reaching for a swatch.

rules.name: The Two-Black Rule
rules.body: Ink (#000000) and Ink Soft (#18181b) are the only two text colours that may sit on Paper. Slate, Mist, Fog exist for legal disclaimers, nav, and labels only — never for primary reading copy.

rules.name: The One Face Rule
rules.body: GT-Standard carries everything readable. Geist Mono is technical notation; Geist Pixel Square is protocol notation. Three families, three jobs, no overlap.

rules.name: The Big-Or-Quiet Rule
rules.body: Type is either Display (≥3.75rem) or quiet (≤1.125rem). The middle ground is avoided. Hierarchy is achieved by jumping scale, not by stair-stepping.

rules.name: The No-Shadow Rule
rules.body: box-shadow is forbidden on every container except .btn-primary, .btn-secondary, and .btn-primary--on-ink. Buttons are the only invitation-to-press in the system and earn the only lift. If a card 'needs' elevation, it needs spacing instead — the button exception is non-transferable.

rules.name: The Hairline Rule
rules.body: Structural separation between sections is achieved with a single 1px line in Hair (#e4e4e7), full content width, never bolder. No double rules, no decorative rules.

dos: Do carry the No-Colour Rule. Greys may shift by lightness, never by hue.
Do set the hero headline in Display (GT-Standard 600, ≥3.75rem, line-height 0.95). The headline earns the page.
Do keep body copy at 65–75ch max width. Long reads are an editorial feature, not an accident.
Do use Geist Pixel Square only for protocol notation (amounts, ids, version strings). It is signal, not style.
Do name implementations by name. Cashu is a directory; wallets and mints appear as plain wordmarks, no logos required at first pass.
Do treat 1px Hair lines as the only structural divider. Sections separate by space first, hairline second.
donts: Don't introduce chromatic accent. Generic crypto landing pages are the anti-reference — neon gradients on black, gradient text, animated 3D coins.
Don't add Web3 / DeFi tropes: pastel gradients, blob shapes, playful money-flow illustrations. Cashu is bitcoin-native and deliberately not crypto-coded.
Don't dress up privacy. No locks, no shields, no padlocks, no ALL-CAPS 'YOUR DATA, SECURED™' copy. Privacy is a property of the protocol, stated plainly.

Don't use box-shadow on any container except .btn-primary / .btn-secondary / .btn-primary--on-ink. Buttons are the system's only lifted surface. Cards, sections, callouts, nav, dividers, and placeholder surfaces all stay flat.
Don't use border-left or border-right greater than 1px as a coloured stripe on cards or callouts.
Don't use background-clip: text with a gradient (gradient text). One solid colour, emphasis by weight or size.
Don't introduce a third typeface. Three families exist (GT-Standard, Geist Mono, Geist Pixel Square) and each has one job.
Don't centre body copy. Long-form reading sets flush left, ragged right.
Don't use stock photography of smiling teams, abstract blockchain visuals, or any hero treatment that could appear unchanged on a fintech site.
Don't ship Chalk placeholder surfaces in final layouts. They are scaffolding only.
